title: Nemesis the Movie: The Mystery of the Golden Spiral
original_title: 映画 ネメシス 黄金螺旋の謎
overview: Set two years after the drama series "Nemesis," Naoki Kazama works for Nemesis Detective Agency and is regarded as a brilliant detective. He is able to solve the most difficult of cases, but he has a secret. He is actually a lousy detective and relies on the genius skills of his assistant Anna Mikami to solve cases. Their partnership continues.

trailers.title: 第一弾予告
trailers.channel_name: ワーナー ブラザース 公式チャンネル
